{{Quote|Urartu says, no humans or Droids. It's a house rule of the Contumely Club, I'm afraid.|Urartu's partner translates for the Wookiee|<ref name="RPG" />}}
'''Urartu''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]] who worked at the [[Contumely Club]], enforcing the Club's policies of allowing no [[Human/Legends|Humans]] or [[Droid/Legends|droids]] on the premises. Urartu made use of a [[Unidentified small sentient creature|small creature]] who translated for the Wookiee. Urartu stopped [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] from entering the Club at some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], despite Garnet having business with a person inside the establishment.<ref name="RPG" />

==Behind the scenes==
In real life, [[Wikipedia:Urartu|Urartu]] was a kingdom in eastern Anatolia (present-day Turkey), existing from before 1000 BC until 585 BC. It might appear in the Bible as Ararat.
